name: Rellax.js — Parallax Scroll
description: Multi-layer parallax depth effect on hero images, backgrounds, and decorative elements. Zero dependencies, buttery-smooth.
body:
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/rellax@1.12.1/rellax.min.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    var targets = [
      { sel: '#hero img, .hero img, .hero-image',    speed: '-4' },
      { sel: '#hero .hero-bg, .hero-bg',             speed: '-6' },
      { sel: '.about-image, .team-photo',            speed: '-2' },
      { sel: '.section-deco, .bg-shape, .blob',      speed: '-3' }
    ];
    targets.forEach(function (item) {
      document.querySelectorAll(item.sel).forEach(function (el) {
        if (!el.classList.contains('rellax')) {
          el.classList.add('rellax');
          el.setAttribute('data-rellax-speed', item.speed);
        }
      });
    });
    if (document.querySelector('.rellax')) new Rellax('.rellax', { center: true });
  });
</script>
